claims.name: affine_invariance_exact
claims.detail: (E_+(T(Q)) == E_+(Q) EXACTLY for 5 random invertible affine maps: clustering and spread-out configurations related by an affine map have identical additive energy)

claims.name: parabolic_rescaling_preserves
claims.detail: (the parabolic rescaling (xi,t)->(xi/lam,t/lam^2) is an affine map sending the cap to a unit patch, keeps points on the paraboloid, and preserves E_+ (5060=5060): a cap-cluster unfolds to a unit-scale configuration with the same energy)

claims.name: extreme_clustering_quadratic
claims.detail: (growth exponent stays <= 2.3 for cap half-angles down to 0.05 rad: 0.3->1.95, 0.15->1.95, 0.08->2.03, 0.05->2.19 -- even maximally clustered sphere configurations have ~N^2 additive energy, NOT N^3)

claims.name: clustering_no_cubic_drift
claims.detail: (the exponent does not drift toward 3 as the cap shrinks: the curvature/affine mechanism holds uniformly in the clustering scale -- the resolution of the audit's cross-scale concern)
